name: Cafe Nut Caramel
recipeInstructions:
1. Caramelize the Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk using the Magic Caramel Pudding recipe.
2. Mix in hot coffee until smooth.
3. Chop pecan nut meats and add to the mixture.
4. Pour into sherbet glasses.
5. Chill the mixture.
6. Garnish with whipped cream if desired.
7. Serves six.
